articles.title: Man City have psychological edge over Arsenal - Rooney
articles.summary: Wayne Rooney says Manchester City have the psychological edge over leaders Arsenal in the Premier League title race.

articles.title: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
articles.summary: The team was returning from a fixture when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles", officials say.

articles.title: Will thrilling Scottish title race be decided on goal difference?
articles.summary: Rangers' 6-3 win over Falkirk extends the Ibrox side's advantage over leaders Heart of Midlothian and Celtic should the Scottish Premiership title be decided on goal difference.

articles.title: Man City smell blood - why Arsenal should fear title rivals
articles.summary: Manchester City capitalise on Arsenal's latest slip-up in style - and now Pep Guardiola's side must be feared as the Premier League title race hots up.

articles.title: Man City make statement in dominant win over Chelsea
articles.summary: Manchester City put three goals past Chelsea in a 17-minute spell at Stamford Bridge, to close the gap on leaders Arsenal to six points with a game in hand in the Premier League.

articles.title: Forest hit back to earn crucial point against Villa
articles.summary: Neco Williams scores his first goal since September to earn a 1-1 draw for Nottingham Forest against Aston Villa at the City Ground.

articles.title: Union Berlin appoint first female boss in Europe's top men's leagues
articles.summary: Marie-Louise Eta becomes the first woman appointed to manage a men's team in one of Europe's top five leagues as she is named interim head coach of Bundesliga side Union Berlin.

articles.title: How relentless Manchester City punished Chelsea
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundits Ben Foster and Pat Nevin praise Manchester City's second-half performance as they overpower Chelsea to secure a 3-0 away win at Stamford Bridge.

articles.title: Who will finish 18th in the Premier League this season?
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundits Ben Foster and Pat Nevin have their say on which team they think are most likely to finish the season in 18th spot and be relegated from the Premier League.
